issues.description: Missing leader type condition. Effect requires 'LeaderHasType' condition with type 'CP' but DSL has 'Always'
SearchDeck action incorrect. Should specify looking at top 5 cards with filter for Character type including 'CP' and cost ≤5, not 'Any' kind
Second trigger 'Trigger' is undefined and semantically incorrect. Should be part of first effect's action sequence or clarified

PlayFromHand is wrong - should be playing from the 5 cards looked at (SearchDeck result), not from hand. Also filter has color 'Black' and maxPower '3' which don't match card requirements (no color specified, cost ≤5 not power ≤3)
No action to trash remaining cards after selecting 1 Character card
